author: Anonymous
title: De Significationibus Missae
remarks: Very brief, possibly Dominican treatment of the vestments, the parts and ceremonies of the mass (no expositio textus), citing Innocent, Aquinas and Albert. Survives in at least three MSS: Dresden, Sächsische Landesbibliothek Theol. A 55 ff. 123–129; Graz, UB 655, 16v-19v; Oldenburg Landsbibliothek Cim I 39, f. 16
